OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-09-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR MONDAY, NOV-09-2009 FOR FURTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE: DANIEL BORNSTEIN, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF; DEFENDANT WILLIAM J. CLARK, JR. APPEARS IN PROPRIA PERSONA ON HIS OWN BEHALF THIS DAY.

A FURTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IS HELD; THE CASE SETTLES. PARTIES AGREE AND SIGN SETTLEMENT DOCUMENT WHICH IS FILED WITH THE COURT THIS DATE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. TRIAL DATE REMOVED.

JUDGE: HON. SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (D-210).

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-09-2009 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-04-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
Judge Pro Tem: Ernst Halperin; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; Not Reported. (Dept. 304-B).
Appearances:
Daniel Bornstein, Esq. for the Plaintiff LKCH LLC., represented by Kou Chang.
Stephen Knaster, Esq., through limited scope, for and with the Defendant William J. Clak.
The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.
Case not settled.
TRIAL DATE CONFIRMED.
